## What's Changed

- Added a dedicated Tube TV bumper library with named groups for before-commercial, after-commercial, or both positions.
- Added per-channel bumper group selection in the custom channel editor.
- Bumper shuffle decks play every eligible bumper before repeating and remain separate for each break position.
- Added bumper playback, guide timeline labels, secure media routes, duration validation, and automatic guide rebuilding.
- Channel watermarks remain hidden on bumpers and commercials.
- Added pagination and 10, 25, or 50 item limits to the Activity page.
- Updated Tube TV documentation and added focused bumper scheduling tests.

## Upgrade

Pull the latest container and restart:

```bash
docker pull ghcr.io/tatertotterson/tater-tube-server:latest
docker restart tater-tube-server
```

No configuration migration is required. Existing channels continue playing commercials normally until bumper groups are selected.
